name: rtime-reminder
description: Write-capable rtime Feishu reminder registration tools with a narrow JSONL contract.

interface.shortDescription: Register, list, and cancel rtime Feishu reminders.
interface.longDescription: Rtime Reminder provides a narrow write-capable reminder registration surface backed by brain/_system/reminders.jsonl. It avoids Claude Code Cron for Feishu phone push reminders and returns metadata without exposing reminder bodies or Feishu target values.
defaultPrompt: Register a reminder for tomorrow morning.
